scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @obscura/shared typecheck && pnpm --filter @obscura/media-core typecheck && pnpm --filter @obscura/web typecheck
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @obscura/shared test && pnpm --filter @obscura/media-core test && pnpm --filter @obscura/web test
scripts.check: pnpm typecheck && pnpm lint && pnpm format:check && pnpm test && pnpm build
scripts.clean: pnpm --filter @obscura/web clean && pnpm --filter @obscura/shared clean && pnpm --filter @obscura/media-core clean
